Text: I highly recommend Eshita for TA role and would love to work together again. Eshita is amazing at her job! She knows her way around people, does whatever it takes to help colleagues and gets things done.

Sai is a great person to work with. He was instrumental in defining behavior analytics which led to funnel optimization across all apps at Oye!Rickshaw. His analytical skills and understanding of products is commendable. He built trackers for metrics around the impact and adoption of new features using SQL-based queries. He has natural curiosity and shows enthusiasm to learn new things. I highly recommend Sai to roles in Product Management.
